customDetailFormulas.calculatedFormula: IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 1, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 6) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 0), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 2, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 0) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 6), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 3, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 1) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 5), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 4, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 2) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 4), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 5, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 3) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 3), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 6, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 4) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 2), IF( (WEEKDAY(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c)) = 7, text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c - 5) & " - " & text(sirenum__Shift__c.sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c + 1), "NA")))))))
customDetailFormulas.label: Mon-Sun Week
